creator: hydrow.net@gmail.com
text:
Panic happens when bt client starting a download or copying a file > 4Gb.
If the file to be downloaded already exists, there are no panic, and the bt client says file can not be found, however it is there.

Repeated on 2 machines, an iCore workstation and an pentium mobile notebook both with 8.0 RC1.

Thank you for any suggestions.

Here are the dump from notebook:

---------------------------------------------------------------
localhost dumped core - see /var/crash/vmcore.0

Thu Oct  8 19:29:41 UTC 2009

FreeBSD localhost 8.0-RC1 FreeBSD 8.0-RC1 #0: Thu Sep 17 20:45:19 UTC 2009     root@almeida.cse.buffalo.edu:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  i386
